  · rw [lt_div_iff hp0, hd_val]
    let sum_dist (k : ℕ) := ∑ i : Fin n, dist (P i) (P (i + k))
    have h_tri : ∀ k ∈ Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), sum_dist k < (min k (n - k)) * (p : ℝ) := by
      intro k hk
      have h1 : sum_dist k < k * p := sorry
      have h2 : sum_dist k < (n - k) * p := sorry
      rw [lt_min_iff]; exact ⟨h1, h2⟩
    have : ∑ i, ∑ j ∈ Finset.univ \ {i - 1, i, i + 1}, dist (P i) (P j) < (⌊(n:ℝ)/2⌋ * ⌊((n:ℝ)+1)/2⌋ - 2) * p := sorry
    exact this

let s (k : ℕ) : ℝ := ∑ i, dist (P i) (P (i + k))
  have hs1 : (p : ℝ) = s 1 := by rw [hp]; simp [s]
  have h_sym : ∀ k, s k = s (n - k) := by
    intro k; simp [s]; refine Finset.sum_bij (λ i _ => i + k) (by simp) (by simp [dist_comm]) (by simp [add_right_inj]) (λ b _ => ⟨b - k, by simp⟩)
  have h_2d : (2 * d : ℝ) = ∑ k ∈ Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), s k := by
    rw [hd]; field_simp; rw [Finset.sum_comm]; simp [s, Finset.sum_sdiff]
    sorry
  have h_quad : ∀ k ∈ Finset.Icc 1 (n - 2), s k + s (k + 1) > 2 * p := by
    intro k _; rw [hs1]; simp [s, ← Finset.sum_add_distrib]
    refine Finset.sum_intro (λ i _ => ?_)
    have : dist (P i) (P (i + k + 1)) + dist (P (i + 1)) (P (i + k)) > dist (P i) (P (i + 1)) + dist (P (i + k)) (P (i + k + 1)) := sorry
    linarith [this]
  constructor
  · have : 2 * (2 * d : ℝ) + 2 * p > 2 * (n - 2) * p := by
      let sum_q := ∑ k ∈ Finset.Icc 1 (n - 2), (s k + s (k + 1))
      have : sum_q > (n - 2) * (2 * p) := Finset.sum_gt_sum_of_nonempty (Finset.nonempty_Icc.mpr (by linarith)) h_quad
      have hq : sum_q = 4 * d + 2 * p := by
        rw [Finset.sum_range_add]; simp [h_2d, hs1, h_sym, Finset.sum_Icc_succ_top]
        sorry
      linarith
    rw [← hs1] at this; linarith [this]
  · have h_tri : ∀ k ∈ Finset.Icc 1 (n - 1), s k < (min k (n - k)) * p := by
      intro k hk; rw [hs1]; simp [s]
      refine Finset.sum_intro (λ i _ => ?_)
      have h_path1 : dist (P i) (P (i + k)) < ∑ j ∈ Finset.range k, dist (P (i + j)) (P (i + j + 1)) := sorry
      have h_path2 : dist (P i) (P (i + k)) < ∑ j ∈ Finset.range (n - k), dist (P (i + k + j)) (P (i + k + j + 1)) := sorry
      sorry
    have : 2 * d + 2 * p < (⌊(n : ℝ) / 2⌋ * ⌊((n : ℝ) + 1) / 2⌋) * p := by
      rw [h_2d, hs1, ← h_sym (n-1), ← hs1]; simp [← Finset.sum_Icc_succ_top]
      have : ∑ k ∈ Finset.Icc 1 (n - 1), s k < ∑ k ∈ Finset.Icc 1 (n - 1), (min k (n - k)) * p := Finset.sum_lt_sum_of_nonempty (by simp; linarith) h_tri
      have h_bound : ∑ k ∈ Finset.Icc 1 (n - 1), (min k (n - k) : ℝ) = ⌊(n : ℝ) / 2⌋ * ⌊((n : ℝ) + 1) / 2⌋ := sorry
      rw [← Finset.sum_mul] at this; rwa [h_bound] at this
    linarith

have hp_pos : 0 < (p : ℝ) := by
    rw [hp]
    apply Finset.sum_pos
    · intro i _; exact dist_nonneg
    · use 0; exact dist_pos.mpr (by
        intro h; have := hP 1 0 (by linarith) (by linarith)
        simp [h] at this)
  constructor
  · rw [lt_div_iff₀ hp_pos, mul_comm]
    have : (n - 3 : ℝ) * p < 2 * d := by
      rw [hd, hp, mul_comm (1/2 : ℝ), ← mul_assoc, mul_one_inv_cancel (by linarith), one_mul]
      let s (i : Fin n) := dist (P i) (P (i + 1))
      let diag (i j : Fin n) := dist (P i) (P j)
      have hq : ∀ i j, i.val + 1 < j.val → j.val < i.val + n - 1 →
        diag i j + diag (i + 1) (j + 1) > s i + s j := sorry
      sorry
    exact this
  · rw [div_lt_iff₀ hp_pos]
    let m := ⌊(n : ℝ) / 2⌋
    let m' := ⌊((n : ℝ) + 1) / 2⌋
    have : (2 * d : ℝ) < (m * m' - 2) * p := by
      rw [hd, hp, mul_comm (1/2 : ℝ), ← mul_assoc, mul_one_inv_cancel (by linarith), one_mul]
      sorry
    exact this

let s (i : Fin n) := dist (P i) (P (i + 1))
  have hp_real : (p : ℝ) = ∑ i, s i := by norm_cast
  have p_pos : 0 < (p : ℝ) := by
    rw [hp_real]
    apply Finset.sum_pos
    · intro i _
      apply dist_pos.mpr
      intro h
      have : (∡ (P (i-1)) (P i) (P (i+1))).sign = 1 := hP i (i+1) (by simp [hn.ne']) (by simp)
      rw [← h] at this
      simp [EuclideanGeometry.oangle_self_right] at this
    · exact Finset.univ_nonempty
  have hd_real : 2 * (d : ℝ) = ∑ i, ∑ j ∈ Finset.univ \ {i-1, i, i+1}, dist (P i) (P j) := by
    rw [hd]; field_simp
  let d_k (k : ℕ) := ∑ i : Fin n, dist (P i) (P (i + k))
  have h_sum_dk : 2 * (d : ℝ) = ∑ k in Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), d_k k := by
    rw [hd_real]
    have : ∀ i, ∑ j ∈ Finset.univ \ {i-1, i, i+1}, dist (P i) (P j) = ∑ k in Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), dist (P i) (P (i + k)) := by
      intro i
      apply Finset.sum_bij (λ k _ => i + k)
      · intro k hk; simp only [Finset.mem_univ, Finset.mem_sdiff, Finset.mem_insert, Finset.mem_singleton]
        refine ⟨by simp, ?_⟩
        intro h; rw [h] at hk; simp at hk
        rcases h with h | h | h
        · have : i + k = i - 1 := h; have : k = (n-1 : ℕ) := by sorry; linarith
        · have : i + k = i := h; have : k = 0 := by sorry; linarith
        · have : i + k = i + 1 := h; have : k = 1 := by sorry; linarith
      · intro k hk; rfl
      · intro k1 k2 hk1 hk2 h; simpa using h
      · intro j hj; simp at hj; use (j - i).val; sorry
    rw [Finset.sum_comm]; congr; ext k; rfl
  constructor
  · have h_dk_gt_p : ∀ k ∈ Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), d_k k > (p : ℝ) := by
      intro k hk
      have : ∀ i, dist (P i) (P (i+k)) + dist (P (i+1)) (P (i+k+1)) > s i + s (i+k) := sorry
      have : 2 * d_k k > 2 * (p : ℝ) := by
        rw [two_mul, two_mul, hp_real, hp_real]
        nth_rewrite 1 [d_k]; nth_rewrite 2 [d_k]
        simp_rw [← Finset.sum_add_dist]
        convert Finset.sum_lt_sum (λ i _ => this i) (Finset.univ_nonempty)
        · rw [Finset.sum_add_dist]; simp; rw [Finset.sum_add_dist]; simp
        · rw [Finset.sum_add_dist]; simp; rw [Finset.sum_add_dist]; simp
      linarith
    rw [h_sum_dk, div_gt_iff p_pos]
    have : ∑ k in Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), d_k k > ∑ k in Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), (p : ℝ) :=
      Finset.sum_lt_sum (λ k hk => h_dk_gt_p k hk) (by use 2; simp; linarith)
    rw [Finset.sum_const, Finset.card_Icc] at this
    have : (n - 2 - 2 + 1) = n - 3 := by linarith
    rw [this] at this; linarith
  · have h_dk_lt_kp : ∀ k ∈ Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), d_k k < (min k (n - k) : ℝ) * p := by
      intro k hk
      have h1 : d_k k < k * p := by
        rw [hp_real, d_k]; simp_rw [Finset.mul_sum]
        apply Finset.sum_lt_sum
        · intro i _; apply dist_path_lt_sum_neighbor P hP; linarith
        · exact Finset.univ_nonempty
      have h2 : d_k k < (n - k) * p := by
        rw [hp_real, d_k]; simp_rw [Finset.mul_sum]
        apply Finset.sum_lt_sum
        · intro i _; apply dist_path_lt_sum_neighbor_rev P hP; linarith
        · exact Finset.univ_nonempty
      rw [lt_min_iff]; exact ⟨h1, h2⟩
    rw [h_sum_dk, div_lt_iff p_pos]
    have : ∑ k in Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), d_k k < (∑ k in Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), (min k (n - k) : ℝ)) * p := by
      rw [Finset.sum_mul]; apply Finset.sum_lt_sum
      · intro k hk; exact h_dk_lt_kp k hk
      · use 2; simp; linarith
    apply lt_of_lt_of_le this
    gcongr; clear this d d_k hd_real hp_real hP hp hd
    let m := n / 2; let m' := (n + 1) / 2
    have : ∑ k in Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), (min k (n - k) : ℝ) = (m : ℝ) * (m' : ℝ) - 2 := sorry
    rw [this]; simp

let s (i : Fin n) := dist (P i) (P (i + 1))
  have hp_real : (p : ℝ) = ∑ i, s i := by exact_mod_cast hp
  have hd2_real : 2 * (d : ℝ) = ∑ i, ∑ j in Finset.univ \ {i - 1, i, i + 1}, dist (P i) (P j) := by
    field_simp [hd]; norm_cast
  let D (k : ℕ) := ∑ i, dist (P i) (P (i + k))
  have h2d : 2 * (d : ℝ) = ∑ k in Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), D k := by
    rw [hd2_real, Finset.sum_comm]
    apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
    intro k hk
    simp only [Finset.mem_Icc] at hk
    apply Finset.sum_bij (λ i _ => (i, i + k))
    · intros i _; simp only [Finset.mem_univ, Finset.mem_sdiff, Finset.mem_insert, Finset.mem_singleton]
      refine ⟨by decide, λ h => ?_⟩
      rcases h with h | h | h
      · have : i + k = i - 1 := h; have : (k : Fin n) = -1 := by exact_mod_cast add_left_cancel h;
        have : k = n - 1 := by exact (Fin.ext_iff.1 this); linarith
      · have : i + k = i := h; have : (k : Fin n) = 0 := by exact_mod_cast add_left_cancel h;
        have : k = 0 := by exact (Fin.ext_iff.1 this); linarith
      · have : i + k = i + 1 := h; have : (k : Fin n) = 1 := by exact_mod_cast add_left_cancel h;
        have : k = 1 := by exact (Fin.ext_iff.1 this); linarith
    · intros i _; rfl
    · intros a b ha hb hab; exact (Prod.ext_iff.1 hab).1
    · intros ⟨i, j⟩ hij; simp at hij; use i; simp; rw [← hij.2, hij.1]; rfl
  have h_conv : ∀ (i j k l : Fin n), (j-i).val < (k-i).val ∧ (k-i).val < (l-i).val ∧ (l-i).val < n →
      dist (P i) (P k) + dist (P j) (P l) > dist (P i) (P j) + dist (P k) (P l) := sorry
  have h_tri : ∀ (i j : Fin n) (k : ℕ), dist (P i) (P (i+k)) < ∑ m in Finset.range k, s (i+m) := sorry
  have hDk_gt_p : ∀ k ∈ Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), D k > p := sorry
  have hDk_lt_min : ∀ k ∈ Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), D k < (min k (n - k)) * p := sorry
  constructor
  · rw [Real.lt_div_iff (by exact_mod_cast Nat.pos_of_gt (show n > 0 from hn.trans' (by decide))), h2d, ← Nat.cast_mul]
    calc (n - 3 : ℝ) * p = ∑ k in Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), (p : ℝ) := by simp [Finset.card_Icc, hn]
      _ < ∑ k in Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), D k := Finset.sum_lt_sum (λ _ _ => (hDk_gt_p _ ‹_›)) (by use 2; simp; linarith)
  · rw [Real.div_lt_iff (by exact_mod_cast Nat.pos_of_gt (show n > 0 from hn.trans' (by decide))), h2d]
    let m := n / 2
    have hsum : ∑ k in Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), (min k (n - k) : ℝ) = ⌊ (n/2 : ℝ)⌋ * ⌊ (n+1 : ℝ)/2 ⌋ - 2 := sorry
    calc ∑ k in Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), D k < ∑ k in Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), (min k (n - k)) * (p : ℝ) :=
        Finset.sum_lt_sum (λ k hk => hDk_lt_min k hk) (by use 2; simp; linarith)
      _ = (∑ k in Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), (min k (n - k) : ℝ)) * p := by rw [Finset.sum_mul]
      _ = (⌊ (n/2 : ℝ)⌋ * ⌊ (n+1 : ℝ)/2 ⌋ - 2) * p := by rw [hsum]

have hp_pos : 0 < (p : ℝ) := by
    rw [hp]
    refine Finset.sum_pos (fun i _ => dist_pos.2 ?_) Finset.univ_nonempty
    intro h; exact (one_ne_zero : (1 : ℝ) ≠ 0) (by simpa [h] using hP i (i+1) (by simp) (by simp))
  have h2d : 2 * (d : ℝ) = ∑ k ∈ Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), ∑ i, dist (P i) (P (i + k)) := by
    rw [hd]; field_simp; rw [Finset.sum_comm]; apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
    intro i _; apply Finset.sum_bij (fun k _ => i + k)
    · simp; intros; constructor <;> intro h <;> (try simp [h] at *); (try (rw [←h]; simp))
    · simp
    · intros; exact ⟨a - i, by simp [*]⟩
    · simp
  constructor
  · rw [lt_div_iff hp_pos, h2d]
    have hSk : ∀ k ∈ Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), (p : ℝ) < ∑ i, dist (P i) (P (i + k)) := by
      intros k hk; have : ∀ i, dist (P i) (P (i + 1)) + dist (P (i + k)) (P (i + k + 1)) < dist (P i) (P (i + k + 1)) + dist (P (i + 1)) (P (i + k)) := by
        intro i; apply dist_add_dist_lt_dist_add_dist_of_oangle_sign_eq_one <;>
        apply hP <;> simp at * <;> exact (by (repeat constructor) <;> try assumption)
      have : 2 * (p : ℝ) < ∑ i, dist (P i) (P (i + k + 1)) + ∑ i, dist (P (i + 1)) (P (i + k)) := by
        rw [←Finset.sum_add_dist_neighbor, ←Finset.sum_add]; apply Finset.sum_lt_sum (fun i _ => this i) (by simp; exact hn)
      rw [hp]; have hS_low (m : ℕ) : ∑ i, dist (P i) (P (i + m)) = ∑ i, dist (P (i + 1)) (P (i + m + 1)) := by
        apply Finset.sum_bij (fun i _ => i + 1) <;> simp
      linarith [this, hS_low (k - 1)]
    have : ∑ k ∈ Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), (p : ℝ) < ∑ k ∈ Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), ∑ i, dist (P i) (P (i + k)) := by
      apply Finset.sum_lt_sum (fun k hk => hSk k hk) (by use 2; simp; exact hn)
    rw [Finset.sum_const, Finset.card_Icc] at this; simp at this; convert this; ring
  · rw [div_lt_iff hp_pos, h2d]
    have hSk_up (k : ℕ) (hk : k ∈ Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2)) : ∑ i, dist (P i) (P (i + k)) < (min k (n - k)) * p := by
      let m := min k (n - k)
      have : ∀ i, dist (P i) (P (i + k)) < ∑ j ∈ Finset.range m, dist (P (i + j)) (P (i + j + 1)) := by
        intro i; apply dist_lt_range_sum_dist_of_oangle_sign_eq_one hP; use m; simp [hk, hn]
      calc ∑ i, dist (P i) (P (i + k)) < ∑ i, ∑ j ∈ Finset.range m, dist (P (i + j)) (P (i + j + 1)) := Finset.sum_lt_sum (fun i _ => this i) (by simp; exact hn)
           _ = (m : ℝ) * p := by rw [Finset.sum_comm]; simp [hp]; ring
    have : ∑ k ∈ Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), (min k (n - k) : ℝ) * p = (⌊n / 2 : ℝ⌋ * ⌊(n + 1) / 2 : ℝ⌋ - 2) * p := by
      set m := n / 2; have h_sum : ∑ k ∈ Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), (min k (n - k) : ℝ) = ⌊(n : ℝ) / 2⌋ * ⌊((n : ℝ) + 1) / 2⌋ - 2 := by
        cases n % 2 <;> rename_i hn2 <;> (set N := n / 2; have hn_N : n = 2 * N + (n % 2) := by omega) <;>
        (rw [hn_N]; simp [Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_mul]; field_simp; omega)
      rw [←Finset.sum_mul, h_sum]
    refine (Finset.sum_lt_sum (fun k hk => hSk_up k hk) (by use 2; simp; exact hn)).trans_le (by rw [this]; exact le_refl _)

have hp_pos : (0 : ℝ) < p := by
    rw [hp]
    apply Finset.sum_pos
    · intro i _
      apply dist_pos.mpr
      intro h
      have := hP (i+1) i
      simp [h] at this
    · apply Finset.nonempty_univ
  constructor
  · rw [lt_div_iff hp_pos, hd]
    simp only [mul_one_half, mul_assoc, mul_one_half, Nat.cast_sum, Nat.cast_mul]
    have : (n - 3 : ℝ) * (∑ i, dist (P i) (P (i+1))) < ∑ i, ∑ j ∈ Finset.univ \ {i-1, i, i+1}, dist (P i) (P j) := by
      sorry -- Lower bound follows from summing triangle inequalities in convex quadrilaterals
    exact this
  · rw [div_lt_iff hp_pos, hd]
    simp only [mul_one_half, mul_assoc, mul_one_half, Nat.cast_sum, Nat.cast_mul]
    have : ∑ i, ∑ j ∈ Finset.univ \ {i-1, i, i+1}, dist (P i) (P j) < (⌊(n : ℝ)/2⌋ * ⌊(n + 1 : ℝ)/2⌋ - 2) * (∑ i, dist (P i) (P (i+1))) := by
      sorry -- Upper bound follows from summing dist(Pi, Pj) < path_length(Pi, Pj)
    exact this

have hp₀ : 0 < (p : ℝ) := by
    rw [hp]; apply Finset.sum_pos (λ _ _ => dist_nonneg)
    use 0; simp; rw [dist_pos]; intro h; have := hP 0 1 (by simp) (by simp)
    rw [h] at this; simp at this
  have h2d : 2 * (d : ℝ) = ∑ i, ∑ j ∈ Finset.univ \ {i-1, i, i+1}, dist (P i) (P j) := by
    rw [hd]; field_simp
  constructor
  · rw [Real.lt_div_iff hp₀, ← h2d, mul_comm]
    sorry
  · rw [Real.div_lt_iff hp₀, ← h2d]
    sorry

have h_pos_p : (0 : ℝ) < p := by
    rw [hp]
    apply Finset.sum_pos
    · intro i _
      exact dist_pos.mpr (fun h => by
        have := hP i (i+1) (by simp [hn.ne_zero]) (by simp)
        simp [h] at this)
    · exact Finset.univ_nonempty
  constructor
  · rw [lt_div_iff h_pos_p, hd]
    push_cast
    rw [mul_assoc, mul_one_div_cancel (by norm_num), mul_one]
    let S := ∑ i, ∑ j ∈ Finset.univ \ {i - 1, i, i + 1}, (dist (P i) (P j) + dist (P (i + 1)) (P (j + 1)))
    have h_quad : ∀ i j, j ∉ ({i - 1, i, i + 1} : Set (Fin n)) →
        dist (P i) (P (i + 1)) + dist (P j) (P (j + 1)) < dist (P i) (P j) + dist (P (i + 1)) (P (j + 1)) := sorry
    have h1 : 2 * (n - 3) * (p : ℝ) < S := sorry
    have h2 : S = 2 * ∑ i, ∑ j ∈ Finset.univ \ {i - 1, i, i + 1}, dist (P i) (P j) := sorry
    linarith
  · rw [div_lt_iff h_pos_p, hd]
    push_cast
    rw [mul_assoc, mul_one_div_cancel (by norm_num), mul_one]
    have h_tri : ∀ i j, dist (P i) (P j) < (∑ k in Finset.Icc i j, dist (P k) (P (k+1))) ⊓ (∑ k in Finset.Icc j i, dist (P k) (P (k+1))) := sorry
    have h_sum : ∑ i, ∑ j ∈ Finset.univ \ {i - 1, i, i + 1}, dist (P i) (P j) < (⌊(n:ℝ)/2⌋ * ⌊((n:ℝ)+1)/2⌋ - 2) * p := sorry
    exact h_sum

have hp_pos : (0 : ℝ) < p := by
    rw [hp]
    have : ∃ i, dist (P i) (P (i + 1)) > 0 := by
      use 0
      rw [dist_pos]
      intro h
      have : (∡ (P (n - 1)) (P 0) (P 1)).sign = 1 := hP 0 1 (by omega) (by omega)
      rw [h] at this
      simp [EuclideanGeometry.oangle_self_left] at this
    apply Finset.sum_pos
    · intro i _; exact dist_nonneg
    · obtain ⟨i, hi⟩ := this; use i, Finset.mem_univ i
  constructor
  · rw [lt_div_iff hp_pos, hd, hp]
    push_cast
    simp only [Finset.mul_sum, mul_comm (1/2 : ℝ), ← mul_assoc, mul_inv_cancel₀ (two_ne_zero : (2 : ℝ) ≠ 0), one_mul]
    let D (k : ℕ) := ∑ i, dist (P i) (P (i + k))
    have hD : 2 * d = ∑ k ∈ Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), D k := by
      simp [hd, D, Finset.sum_comm (s := Finset.univ)]
      sorry
    have : ∀ k ∈ Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), D k > p := by
      intro k hk
      sorry
    sorry
  · rw [div_lt_iff hp_pos, hd, hp]
    push_cast
    sorry

have hp_pos : (p : ℝ) > 0 := by
    rw [hp]
    apply Finset.sum_pos
    · intro i _; apply dist_nonneg
    · use 0, Finset.mem_univ 0; apply dist_pos.mpr; intro h; have := hP 1 2 (by linarith) (by linarith); rw [h] at this; simp at this
  have h_2d : (2 * d : ℝ) = ∑ k in Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), ∑ i : Fin n, dist (P i) (P (i + k)) := by
    rw [hd]; field_simp; rw [Finset.sum_comm]; apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
    intro i _; rw [Finset.sum_bij (λ j _ => (j - i).val)]
    · intro j hj; simp at hj; simp; constructor
      · have : j.val < i.val + n ∧ i.val < j.val + n := by constructor <;> linarith
        omega
      · have : j.val < i.val + n ∧ i.val < j.val + n := by constructor <;> linarith
        omega
    · intro j hj; simp; rfl
    · intro j1 j2 hj1 hj2 heq; simp at heq; apply Fin_val_inj_iff.mp; exact heq
    · intro k hk; use (i + k); simp at hk ⊢; constructor
      · intro h; rw [h] at hk; simp at hk; linarith
      · constructor
        · intro h; rw [h] at hk; simp at hk; linarith
        · intro h; rw [h] at hk; simp at hk; linarith
  constructor
  · rw [lt_div_iff₀ hp_pos, h_2d]
    have : ∀ k ∈ Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), ∑ i : Fin n, dist (P i) (P (i + k)) > (p : ℝ) := by

      linarith [Finset.sum_add_distrib.symm, Finset.sum_lt_sum (λ i _ => this) (by use 0; simp)]

    calc ∑ k in Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), ∑ i : Fin n, dist (P i) (P (i + k))
      _ < ∑ k in Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), (min k (n - k) : ℝ) * p := Finset.sum_lt_sum (λ k hk => h_Lk_up k hk) (by use 2; simp; linarith)

      _ = (⌊(n : ℝ) / 2⌋ * ⌊((n + 1) : ℝ) / 2⌋ - 2) * p := by rw [h_sum_min]

constructor
  · have h1 : 2 * (d : ℝ) = ∑ i, ∑ j in Finset.univ \ {i - 1, i, i + 1}, dist (P i) (P j) := by rw [hd]; field_simp

  · have h1 : 2 * (d : ℝ) = ∑ i, ∑ j in Finset.univ \ {i - 1, i, i + 1}, dist (P i) (P j) := by rw [hd]; field_simp

    exact (div_lt_iff h_p_pos).mpr h2

have h2d : (2 * d : ℝ) = ∑ k ∈ Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), ∑ i, dist (P i) (P (i + k)) := by
    rw [hd]
    field_simp
    rw [Finset.sum_comm]
    apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
    intro i _
    let f : ℕ → Fin n := (λ k => i + k)
    have hf : ∀ k ∈ Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), f k ∈ Finset.univ \ {i - 1, i, i + 1} := by
      intro k hk
      rw [Finset.mem_sdiff, Finset.mem_univ, true_and, Finset.mem_insert, Finset.mem_insert, Finset.mem_singleton, not_or]
      rw [Finset.mem_Icc] at hk

      · intro h; apply_fun (λ x => x - i) at h; simp at h

        have : k = n - 1 := by rw [←Fin.val_inj] at this; simp [Fin.val_add, Fin.val_sub] at this; exact this

      · constructor
        · intro h; apply_fun (λ x => x - i) at h; simp at h; linarith [hk.1]
        · intro h; apply_fun (λ x => x - i) at h; simp at h; linarith [hk.1]

    · intro j hj; rw [Finset.mem_sdiff, Finset.mem_univ, true_and, Finset.mem_insert, Finset.mem_insert, Finset.mem_singleton, not_or] at hj
      use (j - i).val
      simp [Finset.mem_Icc]
      constructor
      · have : (j-i).val ≠ 0 ∧ (j-i).val ≠ 1 ∧ (j-i).val ≠ n-1 := by
          repeat constructor
          · intro h; apply hj.2.1; rw [←Fin.val_inj] at h; simp at h; rw [h]; simp
          · intro h; apply hj.2.2; rw [←Fin.val_inj] at h; simp at h; rw [h]; simp
          · intro h; apply hj.1; rw [←Fin.val_inj] at h; simp at h; rw [h]; simp
        exact ⟨(by omega), (by omega)⟩
      · simp
  let L (k : ℕ) := ∑ i : Fin n, dist (P i) (P (i + k))
  have h_Lk_lower : ∀ k ∈ Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), (p : ℝ) < L k := by
    intro k hk; rw [hp]
    have : 2 * L k = ∑ i, (dist (P i) (P (i + k)) + dist (P (i + 1)) (P (i + k + 1))) := by
      rw [Finset.mul_sum]; simp [L]; rw [←Finset.sum_add_distrib]; apply Finset.sum_congr rfl; intro i _; simp [add_comm]
    have h_diag : ∀ i, dist (P i) (P (i + 1)) + dist (P (i + k)) (P (i + k + 1)) < dist (P i) (P (i + k)) + dist (P (i + 1)) (P (i + k + 1)) := by
      intro i; rw [Finset.mem_Icc] at hk
      -- Sum of diagonals AC + BD > sum of opposite sides AB + CD in a convex quadrilateral.
      sorry
    calc (2 * L k : ℝ) > ∑ i, (dist (P i) (P (i + 1)) + dist (P (i + k)) (P (i + k + 1))) := by apply Finset.sum_lt_sum (λ i _ => h_diag i); use 0; simp
      _ = (p : ℝ) + (p : ℝ) := by rw [Finset.sum_add_distrib, ←hp]; congr; rw [←Finset.sum_reindex_hf (λ i => i + k)]; intro k₁ _ k₂ _ h; simp at h; exact h; intro j _; use j - k; simp
      _ = 2 * p := by ring
    field_simp; linarith
  have h_Lk_upper : ∀ k ∈ Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), (L k : ℝ) < (min k (n - k)) * p := by
    intro k hk; rw [hp, Finset.mul_sum]
    have h_dist : ∀ i, dist (P i) (P (i + k)) < ∑ j in Finset.range k, dist (P (i + j)) (P (i + j + 1)) := by
      intro i; apply dist_le_range_sum_dist -- strictly less for convex non-collinear
      sorry
    calc L k < ∑ i, ∑ j in Finset.range k, dist (P (i + j)) (P (i + j + 1)) := by apply Finset.sum_lt_sum (λ i _ => h_dist i); use 0; simp
      _ = ∑ j in Finset.range k, ∑ i, dist (P (i + j)) (P (i + j + 1)) := by rw [Finset.sum_comm]
      _ = ∑ j in Finset.range k, p := by apply Finset.sum_congr rfl; intro j _; rw [←hp]; apply Finset.sum_reindex_hf (λ i => i + j); intro k₁ _ k₂ _ h; simp at h; exact h; intro l _; use l - j; simp
      _ = k * p := by simp
    rw [Finset.mem_Icc] at hk; apply min_lt_iff.mpr; left; assumption -- similarly for n-k
    sorry
  constructor
  · rw [h2d, ←hp]; calc (n - 3 : ℝ) < (∑ k in Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), p) / p := by field_simp; simp
      _ < (∑ k in Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), L k) / p := by apply div_lt_div_of_pos_right; apply Finset.sum_lt_sum_of_nonempty; exact ⟨2, by linarith⟩; exact h_Lk_lower; linarith
  · rw [h2d, ←hp]; calc (∑ k in Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), L k) / p < (∑ k in Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), (min k (n - k) : ℝ) * p) / p := by apply div_lt_div_of_pos_right; apply Finset.sum_lt_sum_of_nonempty; exact ⟨2, by linarith⟩; exact h_Lk_upper; linarith

      _ = ⌊ (n/2 : ℝ)⌋ * ⌊ (n+1 : ℝ)/2 ⌋ - 2 := by sorry

have h_conv : ∀ i j, i + 1 ≠ j ∧ j + 1 ≠ i ∧ i ≠ j →
      dist (P i) (P j) + dist (P (i + 1)) (P (j + 1)) > dist (P i) (P (i + 1)) + dist (P j) (P (j + 1)) := sorry
  have h_tri : ∀ i k : ℕ, 1 < k ∧ k < n → dist (P i) (P (i + k)) < ∑ j in Finset.Ico 0 k, dist (P (i + j)) (P (i + j + 1)) := sorry

    rw [this] at h_final
    have hp_pos : (p : ℝ) > 0 := sorry

    rw [hp]

    · intro i _

    rw [hd]

    have h_sum : ∑ i, ∑ j ∈ Finset.univ \ {i - 1, i, i + 1}, dist (P i) (P j) = ∑ k in Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), ∑ i, dist (P i) (P (i + k)) := by

    rw [h_sum]

    intro k hk

    exact this

    have h_sum : ∑ i, ∑ j ∈ Finset.univ \ {i - 1, i, i + 1}, dist (P i) (P j) = ∑ k in Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), ∑ i, dist (P i) (P (i + k)) := by

      sorry
    exact h_le

let s (k : ℕ) : ℝ := ∑ i, dist (P i) (P (i + k))
  have h_2d : 2 * (d : ℝ) = ∑ k in Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), s k := by
    rw [hd, mul_comm, mul_assoc]
    norm_num
    rw [Finset.sum_comm]
    apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
    intro i _
    let f : Fin n → Fin n := (· + i)
    have hf : Function.Bijective f := Function.bijective_iff_has_inverse.mpr ⟨(· - i), (by intro; simp), (by intro; simp)⟩
    rw [← Finset.sum_bij f (by intro j _; simp) (by intro j _; simp) hf]
    let S := Finset.univ \ {i - 1, i, i + 1}
    let K := Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2)
    have h_im : Finset.map ⟨f, hf.1⟩ (Finset.univ.filter (λ j => j.1 ∈ K)) = S := by
      ext x; constructor
      · intro h; simp at h; obtain ⟨j, hj1, hj2⟩ := h
        simp [S, hj1]; rw [← hj2]
        constructor
        · intro hx; simp [hx] at hj1; linarith [hj1.1, hj1.2]
        · constructor <;> (intro hx; simp [hx] at hj1; linarith [hj1.1, hj1.2])

    intro k hk; rw [hp, s]

      intro i; apply (convex_polygon_side_sum_lt_diagonal_sum hP (by linarith [hk.1, hk.2])).1

    intro k hk; let m := min k (n - k)
    have hm : m ≥ 2 := by linarith [hk.1, hk.2]

      intro i; apply dist_le_range_dist_strict hP (by linarith [hk.1, hk.2, hm])
    calc s k < ∑ i, ∑ j in Finset.range m, dist (P (i + j)) (P (i + j + 1)) := Finset.sum_lt_sum (λ i _ => this i) (by use 0; simp)
      _ = ∑ j in Finset.range m, ∑ i, dist (P (i + j)) (P (i + j + 1)) := Finset.sum_comm
      _ = ∑ j in Finset.range m, (p : ℝ) := Finset.sum_congr rfl (λ j _ => by simp [hp])
      _ = m * p := by simp
  constructor
  · rw [h_2d, div_lt_iff h_p_pos]
    have : (n - 3 : ℝ) * p = ∑ k in Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), (p : ℝ) := by simp [Finset.card_Icc, hn]
    rw [this]; apply Finset.sum_lt_sum_of_nonempty (Finset.nonempty_Icc.mpr (by linarith)) h_sk_gt
  · rw [h_2d, lt_div_iff h_p_pos]
    let M := ⌊(n : ℝ) / 2⌋ * ⌊((n : ℝ) + 1) / 2⌋ - 2

      obtain ⟨m, rfl | rfl⟩ := Nat.even_or_odd n
      · simp [Nat.mul_div_right, m.floor_coe, (m:ℝ).floor_coe]; clear h_p_pos h_sk_gt h_sk_lt h_2d hp hd hP hn; induction' m using Nat.strong_induction_on with m ih
        if hm : m ≤ 2 then

          rw [this, Finset.sum_Icc_succ_top (by linarith), Finset.sum_Icc_add_at_left (by linarith)]
          simp; rw [ih (m - 1) (by linarith)]; ring
      · clear h_p_pos h_sk_gt h_sk_lt h_2d hp hd hP hn; induction' m using Nat.strong_induction_on with m ih
        if hm : m ≤ 1 then
          interval_cases m <;> (simp [Nat.Icc]; norm_num)
        else
          rw [Finset.sum_Icc_succ_top (by linarith), Finset.sum_Icc_add_at_left (by linarith)]
          simp; rw [ih (m - 1) (by linarith)]; ring
    calc ∑ k in Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), s k < ∑ k in Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), (min k (n - k)) * p := Finset.sum_lt_sum_of_nonempty (Finset.nonempty_Icc.mpr (by linarith)) h_sk_lt
      _ = (∑ k in Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), min k (n - k)) * p := by rw [Finset.sum_mul]
      _ = M * p := by rw [this]
sorry

let n_f := (n : ℝ)
  let p_f := (p : ℝ)
  let d_f := (d : ℝ)
  have hp_pos : 0 < p_f := by
    have h_pos : 0 < dist (P 0) (P (0 + 1)) := dist_pos.mpr (by
      intro h
      have := hP 1 0 (by simp) (by simp)
      rw [h, oangle_self] at this
      simp at this)

  have h_quad : ∀ i j : Fin n, j ≠ i - 1 ∧ j ≠ i ∧ j ≠ i + 1 ∧ i ≠ j - 1 →
      dist (P i) (P j) + dist (P (i + 1)) (P (j + 1)) > dist (P i) (P (i + 1)) + dist (P j) (P (j + 1)) := sorry

  · rw [lt_div_iff hp_pos, hd]
    push_cast
    rw [← Finset.sum_comm]
    have h_sum_k : ∀ k ∈ Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), ∑ i, dist (P i) (P (i + k)) > p_f := by
      intro k hk
      have : ∑ i, (dist (P i) (P (i + k)) + dist (P (i + 1)) (P (i + k + 1))) > ∑ i, (dist (P i) (P (i + 1)) + dist (P (i + k)) (P (i + k + 1))) :=
        Finset.sum_gt_sum (λ i _ => h_quad i (i + k) (by sorry)) (by use 0; simp)

        apply Finset.sum_bij (λ i _ => i + 1); repeat (simp; intros); exact i - 1; repeat (simp; intros)
      have s2 : ∑ i, dist (P i) (P (i + 1)) = p_f := by rw [hp]
      have s3 : ∑ i, dist (P (i + k)) (P (i + k + 1)) = p_f := by
        rw [hp]; apply Finset.sum_bij (λ i _ => i + k); repeat (simp; intros); exact i - k; repeat (simp; intros)
      linarith
    have h_d_sum : 2 * (1 / 2 * ∑ i, ∑ j ∈ (Finset.univ \ {i - 1, i, i + 1}), dist (P i) (P j)) =
        ∑ k in Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), ∑ i, dist (P i) (P (i + k)) := by
      rw [mul_assoc, mul_one_half, ← Finset.sum_comm]
      apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
      intro i _; apply Finset.sum_bij (λ j _ => (j.1 + n - i.1) % n); repeat sorry
    rw [h_d_sum]
    calc (n_f - 3) * p_f = ∑ k in Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), p_f := by
          simp [Finset.card_Icc, hn]; ring
         _ < ∑ k in Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), ∑ i, dist (P i) (P (i + k)) := Finset.sum_lt_sum (λ k hk => h_sum_k k hk) (by use 2; simp; linarith)
  · rw [div_lt_iff hp_pos, hd]
    push_cast
    have h_d_sum : 2 * (1 / 2 * ∑ i, ∑ j ∈ (Finset.univ \ {i - 1, i, i + 1}), dist (P i) (P j)) =
        ∑ k in Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), ∑ i, dist (P i) (P (i + k)) := sorry
    rw [h_d_sum]
    have h_sum_min : ∀ k ∈ Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), ∑ i, dist (P i) (P (i + k)) < (min k (n - k) : ℝ) * p_f := by
      intro k hk; calc ∑ i, dist (P i) (P (i + k)) < ∑ i, ∑ m in Finset.range k, dist (P (i + m)) (P (i + m + 1)) := Finset.sum_lt_sum (λ i _ => h_path i k (by sorry)) (by use 0; simp)
      _ = k * p_f := by rw [Finset.sum_comm]; simp [hp]; apply Finset.sum_congr rfl; intros; apply Finset.sum_bij (λ i _ => i + m); repeat sorry
      -- and similarly for n-k, then take min.
      sorry
    calc ∑ k in Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), ∑ i, dist (P i) (P (i + k)) < ∑ k in Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), (min k (n - k) : ℝ) * p_f := Finset.sum_lt_sum (λ k hk => h_sum_min k hk) (by use 2; simp; linarith)
         _ = (∑ k in Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), (min k (n - k) : ℝ)) * p_f := by rw [Finset.sum_mul]
         _ = (⌊n_f / 2⌋ * ⌊(n_f + 1) / 2⌋ - 2) * p_f := by sorry

let L (k : ℕ) : ℝ := ∑ i, dist (P i) (P (i + k))
  have h_2d : (2 * d : ℝ) = ∑ k ∈ Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), L k := by
    rw [hd]
    field_simp
    let s := ∑ i, ∑ j ∈ Finset.univ \ {i - 1, i, i + 1}, dist (P i) (P j)
    have : s = ∑ k ∈ Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), L k := sorry
    exact this
  have h_p : (p : ℝ) = L 1 := by rw [hp]; rfl
  have h_L_symm : ∀ k, L k = L (n - k) := sorry
  have h_L_lower : ∀ k, 1 ≤ k → k < n - 1 → L k + L (k + 1) > 2 * p := sorry
  have h_L_upper : ∀ k, 0 < k → k < n → L k < (min k (n - k)) * p := sorry
  constructor
  · rw [div_gt_iff (by sorry), h_2d]
    have : ∑ k ∈ Finset.Icc 1 (n - 2), (L k + L (k + 1)) > 2 * (n - 2) * p := sorry
    have : 2 * L 1 + 2 * ∑ k ∈ Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), L k + 2 * L (n - 1) > 4 * (n - 2) * p := sorry
    linarith
  · rw [div_lt_iff (by sorry), h_2d]
    let M := ⌊(n : ℝ) / 2⌋ * ⌊((n : ℝ) + 1) / 2⌋ - 2
    have : ∑ k ∈ Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), L k < (∑ k ∈ Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), (min k (n - k) : ℝ)) * p := sorry
    have : ∑ k ∈ Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), (min k (n - k) : ℝ) = M := sorry
    linarith

have hp_pos : (p : ℝ) > 0 := by
    have : ∀ i, dist (P i) (P (i + 1)) > 0 := by
      intro i
      have h1 : (i + 1 : Fin n) ≠ i := by
        intro h; have := hn; rw [←Fin.ext_iff] at h
        cases n with | zero => contradiction | succ n =>
        cases n with | zero => contradiction | succ n =>
        cases n with | zero => contradiction | succ n =>
        simp [Fin.ext_iff] at h
      have h2 : (i + 1 : Fin n) ≠ i - 1 := by
        intro h; have := hn
        rw [←Fin.ext_iff] at h; simp [Fin.ext_iff] at h
      have h3 := hP (i+1) i h2 h1
      apply dist_pos.mpr
      intro heq
      rw [heq] at h3
      simp at h3
    rw [hp]; apply Finset.sum_pos; intro i _; apply this
    exact Finset.univ_nonempty
  have h_low : (n - 3 : ℝ) < 2 * d / p := by
    rw [hd, mul_comm, mul_assoc, mul_one_div, mul_inv_cancel (two_ne_zero : (2 : ℝ) ≠ 0), mul_one]
    let e (i : Fin n) := dist (P i) (P (i + 1))
    have h_diag_sum : (∑ i, ∑ j ∈ Finset.univ \ {i - 1, i, i + 1}, (dist (P i) (P j) + dist (P (i + 1)) (P (j + 1)))) > (∑ i, ∑ j ∈ Finset.univ \ {i - 1, i, i + 1}, (e i + e j)) := by
      apply Finset.sum_lt_sum
      · intro i _; apply Finset.sum_nonempty_of_mem; simp; use i + 2; simp
        repeat { apply hn_cont; intro h; rw [←Fin.ext_iff] at h; simp [Fin.ext_iff] at h; linarith }
        where hn_cont (f : (n = 1 ∨ n = 2 ∨ n = 3) → Prop) := by linarith
      · intro i _ j hj; simp at hj; exact dist_add_dist_pos_of_convex hP i j hj.1 hj.2.1 hj.2.2
    have h_lhs : ∑ i, ∑ j ∈ Finset.univ \ {i - 1, i, i + 1}, (dist (P i) (P j) + dist (P (i + 1)) (P (j + 1))) = 2 * (∑ i, ∑ j ∈ Finset.univ \ {i - 1, i, i + 1}, dist (P i) (P j)) := by
      sorry
    have h_rhs : ∑ i, ∑ j ∈ Finset.univ \ {i - 1, i, i + 1}, (e i + e j) = 2 * (n - 3) * p := by
      sorry
    linarith
  have h_high : (2 * d / p : ℝ) < ⌊(n : ℝ) / 2⌋ * ⌊((n : ℝ) + 1) / 2⌋ - 2 := by
    sorry
  exact ⟨h_low, h_high⟩

have hp_pos : 0 < (p : ℝ) := by
    rw [hp]; apply Finset.sum_pos; intro i _; apply dist_pos.2; intro h;
    have h_angle := hP (i+1) i (i-1) (by simp; omega) (by simp)
    rw [h, oangle_self_left, sign_zero] at h_angle; contradiction
  constructor
  · rw [div_lt_iff hp_pos, hd, mul_assoc, mul_one_half, mul_comm, ← mul_assoc, two_mul]
    let S := ∑ i, ∑ j ∈ Finset.univ \ {i-1, i, i+1}, dist (P i) (P j)
    have h_reindex : S = ∑ i, ∑ j ∈ Finset.univ \ {i-1, i, i+1}, dist (P (i+1)) (P (j+1)) := by
      apply Finset.sum_congr rfl; intro i _; apply Finset.sum_bij (λ j _ ↦ j+1) <;> aesop
    have h_lower : (n-3 : ℝ) * p < S := by
      rw [hp, Finset.mul_sum, h_reindex, ← Finset.sum_add_distrib]
      apply Finset.sum_lt_sum_of_nonempty Finset.univ_nonempty
      intro i _; rw [Finset.mul_sum, ← Finset.sum_add_distrib]
      apply Finset.sum_lt_sum (Finset.univ \ {i-1, i, i+1}).nonempty_of_card_pos
      · intro j hj; apply dist_triangle_less_add_dist_angle; rw [dist_comm (P i)]
        have h_angle := hP (i+1) i j (by aesop) (by aesop)
        intro h_flat; rw [h_flat, sign_zero] at h_angle; contradiction
      · intro j _; exact dist_nonneg
    rw [hd] at h_lower; linarith
  · rw [lt_div_iff hp_pos, hd, mul_assoc, mul_one_half, mul_comm]
    let f (n : ℕ) : ℝ := ⌊ (n : ℝ) / 2 ⌋ * ⌊ (n : ℝ + 1) / 2 ⌋ - 2
    have h_sum_min : f n = 1/2 * ∑ i, ∑ j ∈ Finset.univ \ {i-1, i, i+1}, (if (dist_path : ℝ) := (∑ k ∈ Finset.Ico 0 (dist_edge_count : ℕ), dist (P (i+k)) (P (i+k+1))), True then (min (dist_edge_count : ℝ) (n - dist_edge_count : ℝ)) else 0) := sorry
    have h_upper : (d : ℝ) < f n * p / 2 := sorry
    linarith

have hp0 : (p : ℝ) > 0 := by
    rw [hp]
    have h_dist : ∀ i, dist (P i) (P (i + 1)) > 0 := by
      intro i; apply dist_pos.mpr; intro h; have := hP (i + 1) (i + 2); rw [← h] at this; simp at this
    exact Finset.sum_pos (λ i _ => h_dist i) Finset.univ_nonempty
  have h2d : 2 * (d : ℝ) = ∑ i, ∑ j ∈ Finset.univ \ {i - 1, i, i + 1}, dist (P i) (P j) := by
    rw [hd]; simp; ring
  constructor
  · rw [lt_div_iff hp0, mul_comm]
    have h_quad : ∀ i j, j ∉ ({i - 1, i, i + 1} : Finset (Fin n)) → dist (P i) (P j) + dist (P (i + 1)) (P (j + 1)) > dist (P i) (P (i + 1)) + dist (P j) (P (j + 1)) := sorry
    have h_sum : 2 * (2 * (d : ℝ)) > 2 * (n - 3) * p := sorry
    linarith
  · rw [div_lt_iff hp0]
    have h_path : ∀ i k, k ∈ Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2) → dist (P i) (P (i + (k : Fin n))) < (Finset.range k).sum (λ m => dist (P (i + m)) (P (i + m + 1))) := sorry
    have h_path2 : ∀ i k, k ∈ Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2) → dist (P i) (P (i + (k : Fin n))) < (Finset.range (n - k)).sum (λ m => dist (P (i + k + m)) (P (i + k + m + 1))) := sorry
    have h_sum : 2 * (d : ℝ) < (⌊(n : ℝ) / 2⌋ * ⌊((n : ℝ) + 1) / 2⌋ - 2) * p := sorry
    exact h_sum

have hp₀ : 0 < (p : ℝ) := by
    rw [hp]; apply Finset.sum_pos; intro i _; apply dist_pos.2; intro h
    have h1 := hP (i+1) (i+2) (by simp) (by simp); rw [←h, (EuclideanGeometry.oangle_self _ _).sign_eq_zero] at h1; norm_num at h1
  have h2d : 2 * (d : ℝ) = ∑ k in Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), ∑ i, dist (P i) (P (i + k)) := by
    rw [hd, mul_comm, mul_assoc, mul_one_div, mul_inv_cancel (two_ne_zero : (2 : ℝ) ≠ 0), one_mul]
    rw [Finset.sum_comm]; apply Finset.sum_congr rfl; intro i _
    let f : Fin n ↪ Fin n := ⟨λ j => j - i, λ _ _ h => i + _ = i + _ ▸ h⟩
    rw [← Finset.sum_map _ f]; apply Finset.sum_congr; · ext j; simp; intro h₁ h₂ h₃; rotate_left
    · intro j hj; simp; rotate_left
    · ext j; simp; constructor
      · intro hj; use i + j; simp [hj]
        constructor
        · intro h; apply hj; rw [h, i.add_sub_cancel]
        · constructor
          · intro h; apply hj; rw [h, i.add_sub_cancel]; simp
          · intro h; apply hj; rw [h, i.add_sub_cancel]; simp
      · rintro ⟨j', hj', rfl⟩; simp at hj'; simp [hj']
  have hsk_gt : ∀ k ∈ Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), p < ∑ i, dist (P i) (P (i + k)) := by
    intro k hk; rw [hp]; have : ∀ i, dist (P i) (P (i + 1)) + dist (P (i + k), P (i + k + 1)) < dist (P i) (P (i + k)) + dist (P (i + 1), P (i + k + 1)) := sorry
    have hsum := Finset.sum_lt_sum (λ i _ => this i) Finset.univ_nonempty
    simpa [Finset.sum_add_distrib, Finset.sum_range] using hsum
  have hsk_lt : ∀ k ∈ Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), (∑ i, dist (P i) (P (i + k))) < min k (n - k) * p := by
    intro k hk; let m := min k (n - k); have : ∀ i, dist (P i) (P (i + k)) < m * p / n := sorry
    have hsum := Finset.sum_lt_sum (λ i _ => this i) Finset.univ_nonempty
    simpa [Finset.sum_const, n] using hsum
  constructor
  · rw [Real.lt_div_iff hp₀, h2d, ← (Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2)).card_nsmul p]
    apply Finset.sum_lt_sum hsk_gt; use 2; simp; constructor <;> linarith
  · rw [Real.div_lt_iff hp₀, h2d, ← Finset.sum_mul]
    apply (Finset.sum_lt_sum hsk_lt (by use 2; simp; constructor <;> linarith)).trans_le
    rw [le_of_eq]; congr; clear h2d hsk_gt hsk_lt hn hP hp hd P p d
    induction' n using Nat.strong_induction_on with n ih; linarith [hn]
